◎简　　介  

　　A group of soldiers and their commanding officer (Amitabh) are captured behind the enemy lines in Pakistan Occupied Kashmir. His naive son (Khanna) tries to spring him, for which he needs he help of a cynical prisoner (Dutt) who is not willing to help.
